calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-09-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-09-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Department 206 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up.
Department 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Dustin Amrein, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.,
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant MICHAEL K. BROOM,
Declaration of Melinda K. Stephenson pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.

Plaintiff's Exhibits:
1-Notice of Time and Place of Trial
2-Declaration pursuant to CCP 98 submitted in lieu of testimony.
Court returned all exhibits to Plaintiff.

After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. and against Defendant MICHAEL K. BROOM as follows:
Principal $5,536.34
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $404.65
Total Judgment in the amount of $5,940.99

Judgment signed in open court.

Notice Of And Motion For Order Compelling Response To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents And First Set Of Interrogatories; And For Order Deeming Admissions Admitted
Off Calendar Dec-23-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. Motion For Order Compelling Response To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents And First Set Of Interrogatories; And For Order Deeming Admissions Admitted is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare the proposed order. Judge Pro Tem: Sigrid Irias; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-02-2016 Set For Trial On Jan-09-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
